metadata.name: Create a Field Boundary from Drone Imagery

description: A farmer has a new field and has flown a drone over it. They need the agent to create an accurate field boundary from the image.

nodes.task_description: Process the drone image of the new field.
Use image analysis to automatically detect the edges of the cultivated area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's model draws a polygon around the edge of the field.

nodes.task_description: Save the new polygon as a field boundary in the farm management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully saves the new boundary.
